data.Name: Drogon Valysar — DG2 Volumetrics Workflow Run (porosity ×0.8, 50 realisations)
data.Description: DG2 volumetrics workflow for the Valysar formation of the Drogon field. Same three-step structure as DG1 but with revised petrophysical interpretation: porosity reduced by factor 0.8 based on additional core data and thin-section analysis. Ensemble expanded from 3 to 50 Latin Hypercube realisations for improved uncertainty quantification. Pore-dependent volumes (Oil, Gas, etc.) correspondingly reduced by ~20%. OWC depths and structural model unchanged from DG1.

Parameters.Title: InputParameters
Parameters.Description: DG2 per-realisation OWC depth and revised PHIT input parameter table (porosity ×0.8)

Parameters.Title: Process
Parameters.Description: RMS reservoir model workflow that executes the DG2 realisations
Parameters.StringParameter: RMS DecisionExample — Drogon Valysar (DG2, revised PHIT)

Parameters.Title: NumberOfRealizations
Parameters.Description: Number of realisations executed in the DG2 ensemble

Parameters.Title: Workflow
Parameters.Description: Workflow label within the RMS project

Parameters.Title: Method
Parameters.Description: Uncertainty sampling method — upgraded to Latin Hypercube at DG2

Parameters.Title: Variables
Parameters.Description: Uncertainty variable configuration: OWC contacts (7 segments, unchanged) and PHIT per facies (Floodplain, Channel, Crevasse) revised ×0.8.

Parameters.Title: DesignMatrix
Parameters.Description: Design matrix for 50 realisations: 3 anchored (Base/Low/High) + 47 Latin Hypercube draws.

Parameters.Title: OutputParameters
Parameters.Description: Generated DG2 per-realisation input parameter table (porosity ×0.8)

Parameters.Title: OutputVolumes
Parameters.Description: DG2 per-realisation estimated volumes (RAW REV WPC, ×0.8)

Parameters.Title: ReportTable
Parameters.Description: DG2 statistical aggregation of realisations (STAT REV WPC: P10/P50/P90)

Parameters.Title: GeoModelDataspace
Parameters.Description: RDDMS ETP dataspace containing the Drogon geomodel EPC files. Shared structural model — same dataspace as DG1.
